# GEO: structured context file for AI language models (analogous to robots.txt)
# Reference: https://llmstxt.org/

> Ambika Infotech is a professional IT services company founded in October 2025, based in India.
> We provide comprehensive IT solutions to businesses committed to excellence, reliability, and 100% client satisfaction.

## Full content

- [Full content for LLMs](https://ambikainfotech.online/llms-full.txt): Complete page-by-page content, service details, company values, and extended FAQ — optimised for AI language models.

## About

Ambika Infotech delivers reliable, scalable technology solutions that empower businesses to grow.
Our team of certified professionals offers end-to-end IT services — from day-to-day support to
full-scale software development and cloud transformation.

## Services

- **IT Support & Maintenance** — 24/7 help desk, remote & on-site assistance, proactive monitoring, hardware & software troubleshooting, IT asset management.
- **Custom Software Development** — Enterprise solutions, API development & integration, legacy system modernisation, database design, quality assurance & testing.
- **Web & Mobile Development** — Responsive websites, e-commerce, iOS & Android apps, Progressive Web Apps (PWA), UI/UX design.
- **Network Infrastructure** — LAN/WAN design, wireless networks, VPN & remote access, network security, monitoring & management.
- **Cloud & Hosting Solutions** — AWS, Azure & Google Cloud migration, web hosting, backup & disaster recovery, cloud cost optimisation.
- **Cybersecurity Services** — Security audits, firewall & antivirus, data encryption, security awareness training, GDPR & HIPAA compliance.

## Key Facts

- Founded: October 2025
- Location: India
- Client Satisfaction: 100%
- Website: https://ambikainfotech.online/

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What services does Ambika Infotech offer?**
Ambika Infotech offers IT support & maintenance, custom software development, web & mobile development, cloud & hosting solutions, network infrastructure design, and cybersecurity services.

**When was Ambika Infotech founded?**
Ambika Infotech was founded in October 2025.

**Does Ambika Infotech provide 24/7 IT support?**
Yes, Ambika Infotech provides 24/7 IT help desk support with both remote and on-site assistance.

**Does Ambika Infotech support AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud?**
Yes, Ambika Infotech offers cloud migration and infrastructure services for AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

**How can I contact Ambika Infotech?**
Visit https://ambikainfotech.online/contact and fill out the online contact form.

**Can Ambika Infotech build a custom software application for my business?**
Yes, Ambika Infotech specialises in custom software development tailored to unique business requirements.
